allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\(json.dumps\(deps, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(npx --yes --no-install tsc --noEmit --jsx react-jsx --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ES2020 src/pages/ARPage.jsx)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else 'array'; print\('type:', type\(d\).__name__, 'keys/len:', keys if isinstance\(d,dict\) else len\(d\)\); first=d[list\(d.keys\(\)\)[0]] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d[0]; print\('first item keys:', list\(first.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(first,dict\) else type\(first\)\); import json; print\(json.dumps\(first if isinstance\(first,dict\) else first, indent=2\)[:800]\)")
